opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My heart has been racing non-stop since I woke up, I feel completely exhausted, and my chest feels heavy and uncomfortable.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A fast heartbeat that has not let up for about 12 hours, with exhaustion, a heavy uncomfortable chest, and a lot of anxiety that something is wrong with my heart.

symptom_narrative.onset: started this morning on waking and has been fairly constant since
symptom_narrative.duration: about 12 hours of feeling my heart racing
symptom_narrative.character: a steady, fast pounding heartbeat rather than a sudden switch turning on
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: very tiring and frightening; I feel wiped out and on edge, with a heavy uncomfortable feeling in my chest
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: racing feeling in the chest with a heavy pressure sensation
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: more or less continuous through the day; no clear come-and-go pattern
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: resting helps a little but it has not settled
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: moving around the house makes me feel more lightheaded and drained
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: lightheadedness when walking around, generalised fatigue and exhaustion, feeling shaky and restless, and a lot of anxiety; denies crushing chest pain, denies pain spreading to the jaw or arm, denies fever, denies actually fainting
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: does not report previous sustained episodes like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: resting at home because of the exhaustion but able to talk in full sentences without getting breathless

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; under a highly stressful work deadline surrounded by work documents; has been drinking a lot of energy drinks over the last two days to keep working; no prescribed medications; denies a thyroid problem or recent illness

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: frightened that the heart is failing and being alone with the symptom

communication_style.typical_message_style: anxious and restless but coherent, describing the racing and exhaustion clearly

objective_data_offered.value: around 120-130 (counted at my wrist), and it feels steady/regular
objective_data_offered.timing: this morning and again just now
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-counted pulse; the patient perceives it as fast and regular but has no device tracing to confirm the rhythm
